dashboard.title: Submission Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Review and manage client submissions
dashboard.manageCardsDesc: Drag to reorder cards or toggle visibility.
dashboard.iconNoSuggestion: AI could not determine a suitable icon
dashboard.helperCardNameEn: The card title shown to English-speaking users. Leave blank to use the default label.
dashboard.helperCardNameAr: عنوان البطاقة الظاهر للمستخدمين العرب. اتركه فارغاً لاستخدام الاسم الافتراضي.
dashboard.helperIcon: Pick a visual icon for this card or click ✦ to get an AI suggestion based on the card name.
dashboard.helperMetricLabel: Optional label shown below the number on the card, e.g. "Submissions" or "Pending". Leave blank to use the default.
dashboard.helperMetricValue: Override the live count with a static number or text. Use @total, @pending, @draft, @viewed, or @needs_rewrite to link to the real-time count. Leave blank to show the automatic value.
dashboard.helperVisibility: Toggle the eye icon to show or hide this card on the dashboard.
dashboard.helperDragReorder: Drag the grip handle to change the order cards appear on the dashboard.
dashboard.helperNewCardEn: Required. The English name for your new custom card.
dashboard.helperNewCardAr: مطلوب. الاسم العربي للبطاقة المخصصة الجديدة.

adminSettings.title: System Settings & Backups
adminSettings.subtitle: Configure automated procedures and enforce strict DB replication strategies.
adminSettings.cronHint: Only one logical interval dictates the global automation.
adminSettings.draftRetentionHint: Number of days to keep drafts before they are automatically deleted.
adminSettings.cloudinaryThresholdHint: The threshold percentage that triggers automatic media cleanup.
adminSettings.storageCleanupHint: Action taken when the storage threshold is reached. (Only files are deleted, DB records remain)
adminSettings.restoreConfirm: WARNING: This will completely replace the current database with the backup data. This action is destructive and cannot be undone. Are you sure?
